sources.title: HuggingFace Transformers LLaMA Documentation
sources.what_it_covers: Complete transformer architecture implementation with tokenization, attention mechanisms, and inference pipeline components.

sources.title: The Illustrated Transformer
sources.what_it_covers: Visual breakdown of transformer architecture from input tokenization through attention layers to output generation.

sources.title: LangChain: Understanding LLM Processing Chains
sources.what_it_covers: Production implementation of LLM processing pipelines with real-world examples of tokenization, embedding, and response generation.

sources.title: The Transformer Family
sources.what_it_covers: Comprehensive analysis of transformer variants and their internal processing mechanisms from attention to generation.

sources.title: OpenAI Text Generation Guide
sources.what_it_covers: End-to-end text generation pipeline including tokenization, model processing, and response formatting for production use.

known_misconceptions: LLMs process text word-by-word sequentially — they actually process tokens in parallel through attention mechanisms
The model 'understands' text like humans — it's performing statistical pattern matching on token sequences
Bigger context windows mean better performance — they increase computational cost and may dilute attention
